identify a unique provider using an NPI, DEA number, and/or UPIN number. 

The HCID (from the HCIdea data) was historically used to assign the CCW-assigned prescriber identifier 
(CCW_PRSCRBR_ID). For current years, an NPI will typically be associated with a single HCID.
